title: Blue Light and Circadian Timing
script_summary: Explore how blue light affects our body clock and why timing matters.

segments.voiceover: Did you know short-wavelength light can trick your body into thinking it's daytime?
This is blue light, a powerful signal for our circadian rhythms.
Excessive exposure at night disrupts sleep, leading to a cascade of health issues.
Studies show that late-night screens confuse our internal clocks.
Limiting blue light before bed can restore your sleep cycle and improve overall health.
Want better sleep? Start managing your screen time wisely. Like and follow for more science insights!
